name: multi-turn-3-5-broker-incremental
anchor: R10-G push machinery (multi-turn broker incremental info)
rationale: Broker provides intake with partial info; subsequent turns add missing canonical fields incrementally (e.g., NOA in turn 2, postal correction in turn 3, lender clarification in turn 4). F3.BR routes each turn; R10-G push integrates each addition into canonical_map. Tests multi-turn canonical-map evolution.
notes: Four-event sequence: intake + 3 incremental updates over 5 days.
